Video.summary: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through LA where a crime wave threatens to tear the community apart.
Video.title: City Under Siege, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through LA where a crime wave threatens to tear the community apart.
Video.title: City Under Siege, Part 3

Video.summary: A bizarre murder is a biochemist's effort to conceal the killing of a woman's husband in order to win her.
Video.title: Me, Myself & Die

Video.summary: When Hunter refuses to reveal an informant to a Grand Jury, he is sent to jail, as a convicted murder is freed
Video.title: Informant

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall follow the trail of revenge and fraud while investigating the murder of a racehorse.
Video.title: Blood Line

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a string of robberies, pursue the thieves, and shoot a man who may be innocent.
Video.title: Shoot To Kill

Video.summary: McCall can't believe that a trauma specialist who once treated her, began drinking again and killed herself.
Video.title: Code 3

Video.summary: SAMMY DAVIS, JR. guest stars as a boxer who helps McCall investigate murders in the world of prize fighting.
Video.title: Ring Of Honor

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate teenage prostitute murders and the prime suspect is a sadistic cop impersonator.
Video.title: Teen Dreams

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall follow a string of torture murders to a money laundering ring and discover an undercover cop
Video.title: Last Run

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the murder of an art gallery owner involved in illegal sales of Indian artifacts
Video.title: Return Of White Cloud

Video.summary: Hunter becomes involved with a beautiful radio host when he goes undercover to catch a killer.
Video.title: On Air

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall are assigned to protect the Irish patriot brother of Devane's new lady friend.
Video.title: Shillelagh

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue the killer of college student who was the brother of Hunter's old friend.
Video.title: Investment In Death

Video.summary: Hunter searches for the killer of a runaway girl whose baby he helped to deliver.
Video.title: A Girl Named Hunter

Video.summary: Hunter defies departmental policy to save McCall from a kidnapper and bring her back to the police force.
Video.title: The Legion, Part 1

Video.summary: Hunter defies departmental policy to save McCall from a kidnapper and bring her back to the police force.
Video.title: The Legion, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter is asked to take the shocking case of a Vietnamese teenager who is accused of murdering a car salesman.
Video.title: Yesterday's Child

Video.summary: Hunter's new trainee, the son of a career officer, has problems doing his duty while investigating murder.
Video.title: Shield Of Honor

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall track down a departmental leak in the investigation of a serial killer and his victims.
Video.title: The Fifth Victim

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a teenager who accidentally kills a drug dealer and flees with the money.
Video.title: Brotherly Love

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue a ruthless Central American doctor who brutally tortured McCall's cleaning woman.
Video.title: The Nightmare

Video.summary: An old flame of Hunter's witnesses a murder but withholds information while her husband blackmails the killer.
Video.title: Broken Dreams

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a mobster's son who kills an undercover officer, unaware the cop is his brother.
Video.title: Son And Heir

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the illegal disposal of poisonous gas that kills a young boy.
Video.title: Unacceptable Loss

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall's visit to a police psychiatrist reveals an intimate relationship from years before.
Video.title: Unfinished Business
